title: aphyllon robbinsii
intro: Aphyllon robbinsii, also known as Green Dragon, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as muscle spasms and pain. The health benefits of Aphyllon robbinsii include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, menstrual cramps, and respiratory issues. Aphyllon robbinsii can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce discomfort.
